subcodes.first_line: O Desire! God's Will hath been made manifest and His Purpose is evident. The heirs of Him Who conversed with God and the children of His Friend have appeared in this Most Great Revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مراد اراده الله ظاهر و مشیتش هویدا وراث کلیم و ابناء خلیل در این ظهور اعظم
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital
